title: TACZ: Plus
description: TACZ: Plus is an addon to TACZ (Timeless and Classics: Zero) which adds in more mechanics rather than new guns.
body:
## TACZ: Plus is an addon to TACZ (Timeless and Classics: Zero) which adds in more mechanics rather than new guns.
## 
### (REQUIRES TIME STOP CLOCK AND TACZ)


The current mechanics are

-Leaning
This is a mechanic found in other games, and allows you to quickly peak around corners at an angle.
![Leaning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfcbba7dceac3c76838cbc6fd9c880cd0c018190.png)
-Deadeye
Inspired by RDR2, deadeye allows you to slow down time, that means all mobs, all projectiles, player movement, is slowed down. This is indicated by the red eye and vignette when you hold down X (configurable).
![Deadeye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fff88240ae6583ecfc87db694c8cde10b435dac.png)

-Focus
Focus zooms you in, makes you unable to move, and adds a vignette, it also stops your hands from shaking when zooming in making you more accurate. The default key is V.
![Focus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91c7a214df2f28cb4d2f77e5f64a9bec78c7054a.png)

There is also a showcase video if you want to see these mechanics in action.
[Showcase Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vH999VyIAHI)
